reviews.review_description: First of, IT’S NOT A SIMULATION SO DON’T GET MAD WHEN YOU FIND OUT IT’S NOT ONE. This game is so much fun and its still in development so there is lots of new stuff going to be added to the game. Great job.

developer_response.body: Thank you Aztronomical, glad you've enjoyed it 😎. Welcome to the squad 🪖.

reviews.review_description: Really a jumping tank. Not a good simulation

developer_response.body:
Hi buddy! Thanks for the review 😎.
First, you're very welcome to help us on our Discord: https://discord.gg/zeefYe6

Now, CT is not a tank simulator but a groovy jumping tanks multiplayer with the vibes of Quake Arena 🪖.

As a tank gunner in real life I can assure you that even World Of Tanks is not a great simulation to real-life tank operation, as in most tanks there is a team of 4 troops to operate it and the handling of driving, loading, shooting and commanding is a lot more complex.

If you have any cool ideas on how to improve CT, the development is very active and you're more than welcome to join our discord and help us out. You can find more info on CrazyTanks.com
